TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Curtis Armstrong kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 12, Curtis Armstrong, squliq na Bunge'. hiya ga squilq psibay ru ppqwas maki Amerika.mhtuw msibay "Revenga of the Nerds" ega' na Booger qu lalu nya. ru mhtuw "Moonlighting" TV na Herbert Viola qu lalu nya. "Risky" ega' mhtuw Miles Dalby . qyanux nya Curtis Armstrong hintgan bih Misken,Titli . Norma E.Armstrong hya laqi nya mlikuy. Armstrong tmasuq pqwasan lelaqi mrkyas maki Berkley pqwasan biru . Suruw lga,Curtis Armstrong tmasuq krahu' pqwasan maki Oakland . Trang mrkyas lga snhi tensyukyo,hya ru Elaine Aronson mnagal bes lga,snhi Yutay la. Hya kneril laqi htagan 1996 kawas,Lily Armstrong lalu nya. Curtis Armstrong skahul nya Wanglu miru mha: yaba maku ga kawas 2020,5,25 wal mhuqil nbu na COVID-19 la. pincyogan nya(qnxan) kawas 1983 hiya minqutux mhtuw ega' Risky Business. 2011 kawas 10 byacing 27 ryax,hiya ga mhtuw msibay na "Engagement" TV. kragan nya Nilsson semong mqwas qwas. Armstrong squilq psibay pincyogan nya,hiya smoya Harry Nilsson ppqwas,suruw lga hiya blaq balay rangi la. kawas 2013,Curtis Armstrong mhtuw msibay "New Girl" na sinsiy Foster qu lalu nya,lru hiya ga mhtuw wal mhuqil ten no ckay . Metatron ryax te qeru,mopuw ru mopuw qutux. Babaw nya lga,hiya msibay na Pizza mtbaziy squilq. kawas 1997,Armstrong mhtuw msibay ega' "Meets Nixon" ru mhtuw "Reaper" TV. bincyogan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ arms~ɕtroŋ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ arms~ɕtroŋ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ħija ɣa s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj ru ppqwas~ɕ maki amerika.mħtuw ms~ɕiβaj "re*eŋa o* tħe ner*s~ɕ" eɣaʔ na βooɣer qu lalu nja. ru mħtuw "moonliɣħtiŋ" t* na ħerβert *iola qu lalu nja. "ris~ɕkj" eɣaʔ mħtuw miles~ɕ *alβj . qjanux nja ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ arms~ɕtroŋ ħintɣan βiħ mis~ɕken,titli . norma e.arms~ɕtroŋ ħja laqi nja mlikuj. arms~ɕtroŋ tmas~ɕuq pqwas~ɕan lelaqi mrkjas~ɕ maki βerklej pqwas~ɕan βiru . s~ɕuruw lɣa,ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ arms~ɕtroŋ tmas~ɕuq kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan maki oaklan* . traŋ mrkjas~ɕ lɣa s~ɕnħi tens~ɕjukjo,ħja ru elaine arons~ɕon mnaɣal βes~ɕ lɣa,s~ɕnħi jutaj la. ħja kneril laqi ħtaɣan **** kawas~ɕ,lilj arms~ɕtroŋ lalu nja. ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ arms~ɕtroŋ s~ɕkaħul nja waŋlu miru mħa: jaβa maku ɣa kawas~ɕ ****,*,** wal mħuqil nβu na ʦ~ʨo*i*-** la. pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja(qnxan) kawas~ɕ **** ħija minqutux mħtuw eɣaʔ ris~ɕkj βus~ɕines~ɕs~ɕ. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,ħija ɣa mħtuw ms~ɕiβaj na "eŋaɣement" t*. kraɣan nja nils~ɕs~ɕon s~ɕemoŋ mqwas~ɕ qwas~ɕ. arms~ɕtroŋ s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja,ħija s~ɕmoja ħarrj nils~ɕs~ɕon ppqwas~ɕ,s~ɕuruw lɣa ħija βlaq βalaj raŋi la. kawas~ɕ ****,ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ arms~ɕtroŋ mħtuw ms~ɕiβaj "new ɣirl" na s~ɕins~ɕij *os~ɕter qu lalu nja,lru ħija ɣa mħtuw wal mħuqil ten no ʦ~ʨkaj . metatron rjax te qeru,mopuw ru mopuw qutux. βaβaw nja lɣa,ħija ms~ɕiβaj na pizza mtβazij s~ɕquilq. kawas~ɕ ****,arms~ɕtroŋ mħtuw ms~ɕiβaj eɣaʔ "meets~ɕ nixon" ru mħtuw "reaper" t*. βinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
S.FORM: Curtis Armstrong kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 27 nqu tay 12, Curtis Armstrong, squliq na Bunge'. hiya ga squilq psibay ru ppqwas maki Amerika.mhtuw msibay "Revenga of the Nerds" ega' na Booger qu lalu nya. ru mhtuw "Moonlighting" TV na Herbert Viola qu lalu nya. "Risky" ega' mhtuw Miles Dalby . qyanux nya Curtis Armstrong hintgan bih Misken,Titli . Norma E.Armstrong hya laqi nya mlikuy. Armstrong tmasuq pqwasan lelaqi mrkyas maki Berkley pqwasan biru . Suruw lga,Curtis Armstrong tmasuq krahu' pqwasan maki Oakland . Trang mrkyas lga snhi tensyukyo,hya ru Elaine Aronson mnagal bes lga,snhi Yutay la. Hya kneril laqi htagan 1996 kawas,Lily Armstrong lalu nya. Curtis Armstrong skahul nya Wanglu miru mha: yaba maku ga kawas 2020,5,25 wal mhuqil nbu na COVID-19 la. pincyogan nya(qnxan) kawas 1983 hiya minqutux mhtuw ega' Risky Business. 2011 kawas 10 byacing 27 ryax,hiya ga mhtuw msibay na "Engagement" TV. kragan nya Nilsson semong mqwas qwas. Armstrong squilq psibay pincyogan nya,hiya smoya Harry Nilsson ppqwas,suruw lga hiya blaq balay rangi la. kawas 2013,Curtis Armstrong mhtuw msibay "New Girl" na sinsiy Foster qu lalu nya,lru hiya ga mhtuw wal mhuqil ten no ckay . Metatron ryax te qeru,mopuw ru mopuw qutux. Babaw nya lga,hiya msibay na Pizza mtbaziy squilq. kawas 1997,Armstrong mhtuw msibay ega' "Meets Nixon" ru mhtuw "Reaper" TV. bincyogan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ arms~ɕtroŋ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ arms~ɕtroŋ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ħija ɣa s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj ru ppqwas~ɕ maki amerika.mħtuw ms~ɕiβaj "re*eŋa o* tħe ner*s~ɕ" eɣaʔ na βooɣer qu lalu nja. ru mħtuw "moonliɣħtiŋ" t* na ħerβert *iola qu lalu nja. "ris~ɕkj" eɣaʔ mħtuw miles~ɕ *alβj . qjanux nja ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ arms~ɕtroŋ ħintɣan βiħ mis~ɕken,titli . norma e.arms~ɕtroŋ ħja laqi nja mlikuj. arms~ɕtroŋ tmas~ɕuq pqwas~ɕan lelaqi mrkjas~ɕ maki βerklej pqwas~ɕan βiru . s~ɕuruw lɣa,ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ arms~ɕtroŋ tmas~ɕuq kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan maki oaklan* . traŋ mrkjas~ɕ lɣa s~ɕnħi tens~ɕjukjo,ħja ru elaine arons~ɕon mnaɣal βes~ɕ lɣa,s~ɕnħi jutaj la. ħja kneril laqi ħtaɣan **** kawas~ɕ,lilj arms~ɕtroŋ lalu nja. ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ arms~ɕtroŋ s~ɕkaħul nja waŋlu miru mħa: jaβa maku ɣa kawas~ɕ ****,*,** wal mħuqil nβu na ʦ~ʨo*i*-** la. pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja(qnxan) kawas~ɕ **** ħija minqutux mħtuw eɣaʔ ris~ɕkj βus~ɕines~ɕs~ɕ. **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,ħija ɣa mħtuw ms~ɕiβaj na "eŋaɣement" t*. kraɣan nja nils~ɕs~ɕon s~ɕemoŋ mqwas~ɕ qwas~ɕ. arms~ɕtroŋ s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja,ħija s~ɕmoja ħarrj nils~ɕs~ɕon ppqwas~ɕ,s~ɕuruw lɣa ħija βlaq βalaj raŋi la. kawas~ɕ ****,ʦ~ʨurtis~ɕ arms~ɕtroŋ mħtuw ms~ɕiβaj "new ɣirl" na s~ɕins~ɕij *os~ɕter qu lalu nja,lru ħija ɣa mħtuw wal mħuqil ten no ʦ~ʨkaj . metatron rjax te qeru,mopuw ru mopuw qutux. βaβaw nja lɣa,ħija ms~ɕiβaj na pizza mtβazij s~ɕquilq. kawas~ɕ ****,arms~ɕtroŋ mħtuw ms~ɕiβaj eɣaʔ "meets~ɕ nixon" ru mħtuw "reaper" t*. βinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
